micro_rules: Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.
Use value entries in conditions and function entries in actions.

rows.command_eng: Set the living room light to yellow.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the living room light to yellow","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#LivingRoom #Light).light_colormode == \"hsv\") { (#LivingRoom #Light).light_setcolor(255,255,0) } else { (#LivingRoom #Light).light_setcolor(255,255,0) }"}
